final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand color palette + typography specification sheet for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy.

Style/medium: needs a "东方美学香氛品牌" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 新中式 editorial visual identity design, 宋画 ink-and-wash color restraint tradition, contemporary Japanese fragrance brand identity (e.g. SHIRO, Aesop Japan); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include three sections clearly divided: primary color swatches, secondary color swatches, and typography specimen — laid out as a formal brand guideline sheet
Subject: must include:
  - Primary color palette: warm autumnal tones inspired by 桂花, 柿子, 枫叶, 乌龙茶
  - Secondary / accent palette: deeper tones inspired by 肉桂, 檀香, 琥珀
  - Typography specimen: display of brand name in both Chinese and Latin scripts, showing typeface name, weight, and size scale
  - Brand name "染秋" and romanization "RAN QIU" as the typographic anchor
  - Core series names as secondary type specimens: "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色"
Scene/backdrop: must be a clean, minimal brand-guideline white or off-white background
Lighting/mood: needs a quiet, refined, poetic mood — exact atmospheric treatment is yours
Color palette: must be anchored in warm autumn spectrum — burnt orange, persimmon red, golden ochre, deep amber, moss green, ink grey; exact hex values and proportions are yours
Materials/textures: needs a subtle paper or washi texture quality — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋", "RAN QIU", "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: must present color swatches with visible color blocks and label areas (color name / HEX or descriptive code); must show at least two typeface weights in the typography section
Avoid: overly Western minimalism; cold or desaturated tones; generic color wheel layouts
